Attended the AWS Student Community Day at Parul University and gained valuable insights into cloud computing from a backend development perspective. The sessions helped in understanding how scalable, secure, and efficient backend systems are built using AWS services.

Great learning experience and an excellent opportunity to connect with the Amazon Web Services (AWS) fellow developers. Looking forward to applying these concepts in real-world projects.

============================
PERSONAL PROFILE — SMIT AGOLA
============================

PERSONAL INFORMATION
---------------------
Full Name       : Smit Agola
Date of Birth   : 15 March 2001
Gender          : Male
Nationality     : Indian
Location        : Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India
Phone           : +91-9876543210
Email           : smit.agola@gmail.com
LinkedIn        : linkedin.com/in/smit-agola-1562b626b
GitHub          : github.com/smitagola
Portfolio       : smitagola.dev

CURRENT JOB
---------------------
Job Title       : Backend Developer
Company         : eVitalRx
Industry        : Healthcare Technology / Pharmacy Software
Location        : Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India
Employment Type : Full-Time
Start Date      : June 2023
Duration        : 1 year 9 months

Responsibilities:
- Developing and maintaining RESTful APIs using Node.js and Express.js
- Integrating pharmacy management modules with third-party healthcare APIs
- Optimizing MongoDB database queries for faster response times
- Writing unit and integration tests using Jest
- Collaborating with frontend team on React.js integration
- Participating in daily standups and sprint planning using Agile methodology
- Reviewing code and mentoring junior developers

- Reviewing code and mentoring junior developers
- Deploying applications on AWS EC2 and managing S3 buckets

EDUCATION
---------------------
Degree          : MSc in Information Technology (MSc.IT)
University      : Parul University, Vadodara, Gujarat, India
Duration        : 2021 – 2023
CGPA            : 3.70 / 4.00
Grade           : First Class with Distinction

Degree          : BSc in Information Technology (BSc.IT)
College         : Shree Swaminarayan College of Computer Science, Ahmedabad
Duration        : 2018 – 2021
Percentage      : 78.5%
Grade           : First Class

School (12th)   : Gujarat Higher Secondary Education Board (GSEB)
School          : Shree Swaminarayan Vidyalaya, Ahmedabad
Year            : 2018
Percentage      : 72%
Stream          : Science (PCM + Computer)

School (10th)   : Gujarat Secondary Education Board (GSEB)
School          : Shree Swaminarayan Vidyalaya, Ahmedabad
Year            : 2016
Percentage      : 85%

TECHNICAL SKILLS
---------------------
Backend Development:
- Node.js (Expert)
- Express.js (Expert)
- REST API Design (Expert)
- GraphQL (Intermediate)
- WebSockets (Intermediate)

Frontend Development:
- React.js (Intermediate)
- HTML5, CSS3 (Intermediate)
- JavaScript ES6+ (Expert)
- TypeScript (Beginner)

Databases:
- MongoDB (Expert)
- MySQL (Intermediate)
- PostgreSQL (Beginner)
- Redis (Intermediate)

DevOps & Cloud:
- AWS EC2, S3, Lambda (Intermediate)
- Docker (Beginner)
- Git & GitHub (Expert)
- Linux / Ubuntu (Intermediate)
- CI/CD with GitHub Actions (Beginner)

AI & Machine Learning:
- RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation)
- LangChain
- Vector Databases (Vectra, ChromaDB)
- Prompt Engineering
- Groq API, Anthropic Claude API

Tools:
- VS Code
- Postman
- Jira
- Bitbucket
- Notion


WORK EXPERIENCE
---------------------

WORK EXPERIENCE
---------------------

1. Backend Developer — eVitalRx, Ahmedabad
   June 2023 – Present
   - Built pharmacy billing and inventory APIs serving 500+ pharmacy clients
   - Reduced API response time by 40% through MongoDB indexing and query optimization
   - Integrated government ABDM (Ayushman Bharat Digital Mission) healthcare APIs
   - Implemented JWT-based authentication and role-based access control
   - Technologies: Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, AWS, React.js

2. Backend Developer Intern — TechNova Solutions, Ahmedabad
   January 2023 – May 2023
   - Developed REST APIs for an e-commerce platform
   - Built order management and payment gateway integration (Razorpay)
   - Wrote API documentation using Swagger
   - Technologies: Node.js, MySQL, Express.js

3. Full Stack Intern — WebCraft Agency, Ahmedabad
   June 2022 – September 2022
   - Built client websites using React.js and Node.js
   - Managed deployments on cPanel and Linux servers
   - Technologies: React.js, Node.js, MySQL


PROJECTS
---------------------

PROJECTS
---------------------

1. RAG Chatbot API
   Description : Production-grade Retrieval Augmented Generation chatbot
   Tech Stack  : Node.js, Express.js, Vectra, Groq API (LLaMA 3.3), @xenova/transformers
   Features    : PDF/TXT/DOCX/URL ingestion, semantic search, multi-turn conversation,
                 rate limiting, caching, Zod validation, Winston logging
   Status      : Completed (2024)

2. eVitalRx Pharmacy Platform
   Description : Pharmacy management SaaS with billing, inventory and ABDM integration
   Tech Stack  : Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, React.js, AWS
   Features    : Multi-pharmacy support, GST billing, drug inventory, patient records
   Status      : Production (500+ pharmacy clients)

3. Social Media REST API
   Description : Instagram-like backend API with posts, likes, comments, follow system
   Tech Stack  : Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, JWT, Cloudinary
   Features    : Authentication, image upload, feed algorithm, notifications
   Status      : Completed (2023)

4. Job Portal Web App
   Description : Full-stack job portal for posting and applying to jobs
   Tech Stack  : React.js, Node.js, MySQL, Express.js
   Features    : Employer dashboard, resume upload, application tracking
   Status      : Completed (2022)

5. Real-Time Chat App
   Description : WhatsApp-like real-time chat application
   Tech Stack  : Node.js, Socket.io, React.js, MongoDB
   Features    : Private chat, group rooms, online status, message history
   Status      : Completed (2023)

CERTIFICATIONS
---------------------
1. JavaScript (Basic)       — HackerRank         — August 2024
2. Node.js (Intermediate)   — HackerRank         — October 2024
3. AWS Cloud Practitioner   — Amazon Web Services — March 2024
4. MongoDB Associate Dev    — MongoDB University  — January 2024
5. React Basics             — Meta (Coursera)     — June 2023
6. Git & GitHub             — Udemy               — December 2022

ACHIEVEMENTS & ACTIVITIES
---------------------
- Attended AWS Student Community Day at Parul University — gained cloud computing insights
- Speaker at college tech fest on "REST API Best Practices" (2023)
- Ranked in top 5% on HackerRank for JavaScript problem solving
- Open source contributor — submitted PRs to 3 Node.js community packages
- 500+ connections on LinkedIn, 615 followers
- Mentored 10+ junior developers at eVitalRx on Node.js and API design

LANGUAGES
---------------------
- Gujarati  : Native
- Hindi     : Fluent
- English   : Professional Working Proficiency


INTERESTS & HOBBIES
---------------------
- Building AI-powered backend systems
- Contributing to open source
- Reading tech blogs (Dev.to, Medium)
- Playing cricket
- Travelling across Gujarat

OPEN TO WORK
---------------------
Smit Agola is actively open to the following roles:
- Backend Developer (Node.js)
- Full Stack Developer
- JavaScript Developer
- API Developer
- AI/ML Backend Engineer

Preferred work mode : Remote / Hybrid
Notice period       : 30 days
Expected CTC        : 8-12 LPA
Current CTC         : 6 LPA
